caption:
MelbourneвҖҷs Albert Park has renamed Turn 6 to вҖңIn Her CornerвҖқ for the 2026 Australian Grand Prix рҹҮҰрҹҮә

The corner will honour Laura Mueller, the first female race engineer in Formula 1 history, and Hannah Schmitz, Red BullвҖҷs Principal Strategy Engineer who has played a huge role in Max VerstappenвҖҷs success.

The tribute is part of the вҖңIn Her CornerвҖқ initiative and will take place during the Australian Grand Prix weekend, which falls on International WomenвҖҷs Day (March 8).

ItвҖҷs a way to celebrate women in Formula 1 and inspire more girls to pursue careers in engineering and STEM. рҹ’ҷ
